brand: BAKERS BEST Arthritis Pain Relief Cream with Hemp and Lavender
usBrand: BAKERS BEST Arthritis Pain Relief Cream with Hemp and Lavender

indications.text: Indications: For the temporary relief of minor aches and pains of muscles and joints, associated with arthritis, simple back aches, strains, bruises, and sprains.

dosage.text: Directions: Adults and children two-years of age or older: Apply to affected area not more than three to four times daily. Children under two-years of age: consult a physician.

warnings.text: Warnings: For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If symptoms persist for more than seven days, discontinue use and consult a physician. Keep out of reach of children. If swallowed, consult a physician ASAP. Do not apply to wounds or damaged skin. Do not bandage tightly. If pregnant or breast feeding, contact a physician prior to use.
